summary.read: The grammar compiler bridge found required field drift. Gameplay edits should wait until this is fixed.

measurementLimits: This bridge proves source-field round-tripping only; it does not prove browser-rendered movement conformance.
Optional fields may be absent in older runtime layouts, so only authored optional arrays count as drift.
After any compiler-driven gameplay change, run challenge-stage conformance and visual timing alignment before promotion.
